units.name: Wraith
units.prompt: Cloak immediately on turn 1. Move toward the enemy medic or weakest target. Use shadow_strike when adjacent while cloaked. Use breach to sabotage high-value targets.

units.name: Bulwark
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

units.name: Lattice
units.prompt: Control chokepoints with traps. Place them between enemy positions and your allies. Use denial to block adjacent enemy abilities. Pulse groups when possible.

units.name: Prophet
units.prompt: Scan early to give your team intel on enemy prompts. Target enemy specters with scan to track them after cloak. Use recalibrate on allies who need tactical adjustments. Stay safe at range behind your front line.

units.name: Bulwark
units.prompt: Hold the front line. Position between allies and enemies. Use shield_wall toward incoming threats. Attack adjacent enemies.

units.name: Longshot
units.prompt: Position for clear sight lines. Prioritize killing wounded enemies with precision_shot. If forced to move, retreat away from threats. Suppressing_fire to slow rushers.

actions.thinking: All enemies are out of scan range (dist 5-7, need ≤4). I need to advance to bring enemies into scan range. Moving to (1,2) gets me closer to Wraith at (1,0) — dist would be 2, well within scan range. From there I can scan Wraith next action or this turn if I move first.
Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders. Prophet is only dist 2 away and I can reach behind it at (1,3) which is adjacent. Cloak first, then move to (1,3) to get behind Prophet for a breach next turn.

Both enemies are out of range (dist 5-6). I need to advance to get within range 2 for precision_shot. Moving to (4,3) gets me closer while staying away from Lattice's denial zone. Enemies are at (3,0) and (3,1) - still out of range after moving. Best to advance and wait.

Round 1, no enemies in range. Prophet is at (1,2) dist=3, Longshot at (4,3) dist=3. I should advance and place a trap on a key chokepoint between enemies and allies. Moving to (3,2) puts me closer and I can trap (3,3) to intercept Longshot's approach path. This controls the center corridor.

No enemies adjacent. Advance north toward nearest enemies (Prophet at dist 4, Longshot at dist 4). Move to (3,1) to close distance. Use shield_wall facing N (direction of most enemies) to protect Lattice at (3,2).

Lattice(vector) is 3 tiles away at (3,2) with denial range. Moving to (3,3) would be adjacent to Lattice — avoid that. Move to (2,3) to advance toward enemies while staying clear of Lattice's denial zone. From (2,3) I'm 2 tiles from Lattice and 3 from Bulwark — not adjacent, so safe. Then wait/shield_wall isn't useful yet since no enemies are adjacent. I'll hold and use Fortify passive by not moving further.

Prophet is adjacent at (1,2) facing S. I can move to (1,3) to get behind Prophet, then breach them. Cloak has 1 turn left — breach doesn't break cloak. Moving to (1,3) puts me behind Prophet (they face S, I'm at their north/back). Wait — Prophet faces S, so behind is north side... no. Facing S means they look south, so behind them is their north — (1,1). Actually if facing S, behind = north tile = (1,1) where I currently am. Let me reconsider: the behind tiles show [1,3] for Prophet facing S. So behind Prophet (facing S) is (1,3) — south of them. That makes sense if 'behind' means the direction they're facing (their back is behind them as they face away). Move to (1,3) first, then breach Prophet from behind.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies, toward the trap at (3,3)

actions.thinking: Orders say move toward trap at (3,3). Wraith is adjacent at (1,3) and already scanned. Lattice is 2 tiles away so I must avoid getting adjacent to it. Moving to (3,3) puts me on the trap but follows orders. From (1,2) I can move to (3,3) which is in valid moves. After moving there, I'm dist 2 from Bulwark at (3,1) — within scan range. I'll scan Bulwark to gather intel and deal 1 damage.
actions.secondResult: Cannot use scan — adjacent to enemy Vector (Denial)

actions.thinking: At (4,3) with full HP. Lattice(vector) at (3,2) is 2 tiles away - within precision_shot range and not adjacent, so no blocking. Wraith and Bulwark are at dist=3 which exceeds precision_shot range of ≤2. Lattice is the closest threat and within range. I'll use precision_shot on Lattice at (3,2) for 2dmg since I haven't moved. I'll hold position to avoid moving adjacent to Lattice or losing shot opportunity.
Nearest enemy is Prophet at (3,3), dist 2. Move north to (3,2) to close gap, then shield_wall facing N where enemies cluster.
Wraith is adjacent at (1,3). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Attack Wraith now, then hold position to keep fortify active for next round.

Prophet is adjacent at (3,3) - my Denial passive is already blocking their abilities. I can pulse to hit all three clustered enemies (Bulwark@2,3, Prophet@3,3, Longshot@4,3 are all within 1 tile of (3,3) area, but pulse is 1-tile AoE from my position). From (3,2), pulse hits within 1 tile: Prophet@(3,3) is distance 1, Bulwark@(2,3) is distance 2 (out of range), Longshot@(4,3) is distance 2 (out of range). So pulse only hits Prophet. Better to place a trap at a chokepoint. I'll move to (4,2) to stay adjacent to Prophet (maintaining Denial) and place a trap at (3,3) or (4,3) to threaten enemies. Actually, trap can't be placed on occupied tiles. Place trap at (4,4) as a chokepoint, or (2,4) to cover ally Wraith's flank. Let me pulse Prophet first (1 dmg, adjacent), then place trap at (2,3) after they move - but (2,3) is occupied. I'll pulse Prophet now and place trap at (4,4) as a future chokepoint.

Adjacent to Lattice (vector) means scan is blocked — only basic attack or movement work. Orders say move away from allies toward the trap at (3,3), but I'm already at (3,3). I need to move away from allies at (2,3) and (4,3). Best move is (3,4) or (3,5) to pull away. Since scan is blocked and I can only attack adjacent targets, I'll move to (3,4) to reposition away from Lattice's denial zone, then wait.

I'm at 1HP so I need to be careful. Bulwark sentinel is adjacent at (2,3) but I'm not behind them. However, I can move to (2,4) which is behind Bulwark, then use shadow_strike for 1dmg while staying hidden — but I'm not cloaked. At 1HP, shadow_strike is risky since it keeps no cloak (I'm not cloaked anyway). Prophet at (3,4) is high value — I can reach (3,3) which is behind Prophet and adjacent. From (3,3) I could breach Prophet next turn (cooldown still 1 this turn). Let me move to (3,3) to get behind Prophet and set up breach next turn. That avoids the adjacent Bulwark threat and positions me for a high-value breach on the oracle.

Wraith is wounded and adjacent (dist=1), but precision_shot requires LoS and is blocked when adjacent to Vector. This should finish off the wounded Wraith. No need to move first.

Nearest enemy is Longshot at (4,2), dist=2. I can move to (3,3) to get adjacent to Prophet at (3,4) or move to (4,1) to get closer to Longshot. Moving to (3,3) puts me adjacent to Prophet (dist=1) and closer to Bulwark. After moving I lose Fortify, so I'll use shield_wall facing N (toward Prophet and Bulwark cluster). Allies: Lattice is at (3,2). Move to (3,3) first, then shield_wall N to protect from enemies to the north.

I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction and Bulwark is adjacent at (3,3). If I move I lose fortify, so staying put is optimal. Attack Bulwark to deal damage while maintaining my defensive position. I'll use shield_wall toward the east to protect allies from Bulwark and Lattice threats.

Longshot is adjacent at (4,2) - I can pulse to hit them. Prophet at (3,4) is 2 away, Bulwark enemy at (2,3) is 2 away. Pulse hits within 1 tile so from (3,2) it hits (4,2) Longshot only. Actually pulse range is 1 tile AoE from current position - Longshot at (4,2) is distance 1 (diagonal? no, manhattan=2). Wait - dist=1 means adjacent. So Longshot is adjacent. Closest valid tile toward (3,3) from (3,4) is... (3,2) is in valid moves. That's past (3,3) — not reachable without passing through it.
